subcodes.first_line: O ye Bahá'ís, O ye who are divinely-guided! The Sun of Truth hath shed its radiance upon the East, and thousands in the Orient have sacrificed themselves [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بهائیان ای ربانیان شمس حقیقت اشراق بر شرق نمود هزاران فداایان در خاور
subcodes.subjects: @East and West; communication between East and West, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @growth of the Cause, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
